violations.text: Allergen advisory statement is lacking on menus. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and dishroom were blocked by a rag and utenstil caddy. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

Various foods were observed held at 48-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Time/temperature abused foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

Grill drawers (57 degrees Fahrenheit) and prep unit (50 degrees Fahrenheit) were observed in poor repair. Units were taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer backsplashes and the shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Allergen advisory statement is lacking on menus. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as bread) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in the kitchen and at the bar was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Machines were adjusted and primed during inspection to the correct chemical concentration. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

French Toast batter was observed held at (72) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was placed on ice and in refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
